description: Pirsch is a privacy-focused web analytics service for tracking page views, events, and site statistics. It provides hosted analytics dashboards and an API for collecting analytics data and reading account and domain statistics.
summary: Pirsch exposes one documented HTTP API at `https://api.pirsch.io/api/v1`, authenticated via either a Pirsch OAuth client exchanged for a bearer token or a Pirsch access key used as a bearer token; no GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
